prompts: A medium close-up in a cyberpunk workshop: a hacker wearing sunglasses and a hoodie types at flickering monitors. Neon shadows rake across a cluttered workbench as streams of code slide across the screens. Medium close-up.

The same cyberpunk workshop setup remains in a medium close-up. The same hacker in sunglasses and a hoodie pauses, leans back, and rubs their eyes while the monitors keep strobing with code and neon light flickers across the cluttered bench. Medium close-up.

The same medium close-up holds on the hacker at the flickering monitors. A small red alert begins blinking on one screen, and the hacker's focus snaps toward it as code continues streaming through the neon-lit workshop. Medium close-up.

The same cyberpunk workshop scene continues. The hacker's hand hesitates over a red EXECUTE button, then presses it decisively while the monitors flicker and neon shadows cut across the cluttered workbench. Medium close-up.

The same medium close-up stays in the cyberpunk workshop. A nearby device's LED flashes confirmation, and the hacker glances over toward it while the monitors continue strobing and code streams by. Medium close-up.

The same hacker remains in the neon-lit workshop as a second device erupts in rapid beeps. They pivot toward it, calm and intent, while flickering monitors and scrolling code light the cluttered bench. Medium close-up.
